data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Applied Materials Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: Applied Materials offers a quarterly dividend amount of 40 cents per share ($1.60 a year). To earn $500 monthly, here's what you do.

data.title: Not Just DeepSeek, China's AI Landscape Heats Up As Baidu Launches Free Ernie Bot
data.description: Baidu plans to launch its advanced AI model, Ernie 5.0, in the second half of 2025, offering it for free and aiming to compete with US companies.

data.title: AI - Taking Stock: The Benefits And Pitfalls Of LLMs And Their Future Applications In Trading
data.description: This AI expert shares insights on why AI hasn't reached its full potential in trading applications and why relying on a single LLM isn't the solution.

data.title: This Kraft Heinz Analyst Turns Bearish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Thursday
